canonical_name: any other man who dwells this earth
the wild Northmen beyond the Roman wall
all the courts of the world
the confidante of both him and the woman he loved
any new Companion, not seasoned by battle
a better man in his soul
the queen of the fairy country
the room she shared with Gwenhwyfar's unmarried maidens
the little lad who frightened the horses at Arthur's wedding, and came near to having Galahad killed
the whole house where they were staying
Jews of the strict observance, from every race under the sky
men driven out of their minds
his voice and said to them
those who are in need of protection
the young men made knights in his company
any who were not pledged Christian
the other knights, jostling and crowding to welcome and congratulate him
the handsomest young man on the field
a man to whom such exercises come readily and who has been handling weapons since boyhood
a few who had no wish to attend the mock battles
